summary: Completed testing of AI Village storytelling experience new features. Successfully verified backend APIs (100% working), accessed village interface, and identified key frontend issues with sidebar overlay behavior.

ui_bugs.issue: When sidebar is closed, overlay elements remain visible (atmosphere-overlay, NPC overlays, backdrop elements)
ui_bugs.selector: Fixed overlays with bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm and atmosphere-overlay remain visible
ui_bugs.expected_behavior: All overlays should be hidden when sidebar is closed

integration_issues.issue: Character creation form does not have clear submit button or proper completion flow

passed_tests: ✅ Backend API: All 9 endpoints working (100% success rate)
✅ Sidebar functionality: Opens and closes correctly
✅ NPC avatars: Elder Morvain and Lyra the Wanderer avatars display with images in location header
✅ XP system: XP display shows in header (0 XP initially)
✅ Milestone system: 'First Steps' milestone visible with progress tracking
✅ Location locking: Multiple locations show 'Locked' status in sidebar
✅ Location images: Background images load and display for current location
✅ NPC presence: Location cards show NPC count ('2 present') with avatar previews
✅ Locked areas section: Shows progress indicator (1/6 locations unlocked)
action_item_for_main_agent: 1) Fix sidebar overlay visibility issue - ensure all overlay elements (.atmosphere-overlay, NPC overlays with bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm) are properly hidden when sidebar is closed using conditional rendering {sidebarOpen && ...} 2) Improve character creation flow by adding a clear 'Begin Your Journey' or 'Create Character' submit button that's easily identifiable 3) Test locked location click behavior to ensure error toasts display correctly 4) Verify XP rewards (+20 for locations, +10 for conversations) are working as intended
